mapper.select: SELECT * FROM repayment_record ORDER BY repayment_date DESC
SELECT * FROM repayment_record WHERE contract_id = #{contractId} ORDER BY repayment_date DESC
SELECT * FROM repayment_record WHERE invoice_status = #{invoiceStatus} ORDER BY repayment_date DESC
SELECT rr.* FROM repayment_record rr JOIN loan_contract lc ON rr.contract_id = lc.id WHERE lc.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY rr.repayment_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO repayment_record (record_no, contract_id, repayment_date, fee_type, principal_amount, interest_amount, total_amount, tax_rate, tax_amount, taxable_amount, invoiced_amount, remaining_amount, invoice_status) VALUES (#{recordNo}, #{contractId}, #{repaymentDate}, #{feeType}, #{principalAmount}, #{interestAmount}, #{totalAmount}, #{taxRate}, #{taxAmount}, #{taxableAmount}, #{invoicedAmount}, #{remainingAmount}, #{invoiceStatus})
mapper.update: UPDATE repayment_record SET record_no = #{recordNo}, contract_id = #{contractId}, repayment_date = #{repaymentDate}, fee_type = #{feeType}, principal_amount = #{principalAmount}, interest_amount = #{interestAmount}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, tax_rate = #{taxRate}, tax_amount = #{taxAmount}, taxable_amount = #{taxableAmount}, invoiced_amount = #{invoicedAmount}, remaining_amount = #{remainingAmount}, invoice_status = #{invoiceStatus} WHERE id = #{id}
